title: Citizenship
response:
To become a citizen of The East Pacific:

1. Move your WA nation to TEP
2. Post in the citizenship thread: https://forum.theeastpacific.com/t/citizenship-application
3. Take the oath in that post
4. Wait for Magisterium approval (usually 24h)

You keep citizenship by maintaining WA endorsement of the Delegate.

title: Endorsements
response: Endorse Delegate @Altys and Viziers daily. It raises regional influence and protects against raids. Check the WADP thread for the current list: https://forum.theeastpacific.com/t/wadp

title: Magisterium
response: The Magisterium is TEP's legislature. Any citizen can apply after 2 weeks. Current laws are in the Concordat: https://forum.theeastpacific.com/t/concordat

title: Concordat
response: The Concordat is our constitution. Read it here: https://forum.theeastpacific.com/t/concordat — it defines the Delegate, Magisterium, Conclave, and Praesidium.
